field_values.action_summary: Carter sneaks out of the city with his thoats to reach the rendezvous point. Upon arrival, he realizes the women are not there and that the plan has been compromised.
field_values.camera_intent: Handheld or kinetic shots of movement through shadows; Wide shots showing subject isolation at empty rendezvous point; POV shots searching darkness
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Light source balance (moonlight vs. city glow)
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH016_SC003

## Production Intent
Establish the transition from a successful covert movement to the sudden realization of a failed rendezvous. The sequence must emphasize the isolation of the character through scale and shadow, moving from kinetic stealth to static panic.

## Required Cast
- john_carter

## Required Environments
- thark_city_and_surroundings
- the rendezvous point

## Continuity Constraints
- Presence/absence of thoats
- Light source balance (moonlight vs. city glow)

## Beat List
- BT001: Sneaking through the city perimeter
- BT002: Arrival at the rendezvous point
- BT003: Realization of failure
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
